name: Vinegar and Your Microwave
recipeInstructions: 1. Boil 1/4 cup of vinegar in a bowl of water to keep your microwave grease free and smelling fresh as the day you bought it. If there are any burned on splatters and spills, a bit of the hot liquid (careful, please, use a pot holder) poured over the mess makes wiping it up a breeze.
